title: Ars Énergistique
description:
Bringing magic to the digital age.

(Ars Nouveau x Applied Energistics 2)
body:
# Ars Énergistique

Ars Énergistique is an add-on mod providing integration between [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) and [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau), allowing for deeper interaction between ME networks and Ars magic setups.

**Features:**
- Dedicated ME Source storage (+ cells)
- Full compatibility between ME network devices and Source-based machines
- **ME Source Acceptor**: Allows for the conversion of Source to AE energy for *powering* networks
- Support for budding Certus Quartz blocks and clusters for the Amethyst Golem
- ...and more still to come.
